package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for gin_logger_debug_body_logging_on_hot_routes: Verbose body or payload logging observed on likely high-volume Gin routes.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule317NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule317NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule317NegativeRecord) (Rule317NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario317Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule317NegativeService, input Rule317NegativeRecord) (Rule317NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule317NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
